text:
Created attachment 236263
git diff --staged > ../`make -VPKGNAME`.diff

ports-mgmt/portconfig: update from 0.3 to 0.4

This project has not a CHANGELOG.

Delete file/patch-Makefile: static linking to bsdddialog.a added to upstream Makefile.

Testing:

# portlint -A
# port test
# portfmt -i ./Makefile

# poudriere testport -j 140Camd64 -p default -i -o ports-mgmt/portconfig
